error_signature: The system cannot find the path specified
title: Path not found in Execute Command node
symptom: The Execute Command node fails to read the specified path, resulting in an error message stating 'The system cannot find the path specified'. This occurs when using an expression in the path.
root_cause: The error occurs because the path is being treated as a string literal rather than being evaluated as an expression. This happens when the expression is not correctly formatted or set in the workflow, leading to the command failing to locate the specified directory.
fix_steps: Add a Set node before the Execute Command node.
In the Set node, create a field (e.g., finalPath) and set its value to the correct expression format.
Update the Execute Command node to use the new field for the path.
agent_instruction: Use a Set node to correctly format the path expression before passing it to the Execute Command node.
